tasks.title: Add CRITICAL_FILES const to hex-core/src/domain/validation.rs listing infrastructure files that autonomous agents cannot modify (sched.rs, monitor.rs, workplan_executor.rs, main.rs)
Add is_critical_path(path: &str) -> bool function to hex-core/src/domain/validation.rs that checks if path matches any CRITICAL_FILES pattern

phases.title: Domain: Define critical file validation rule

tasks.title: Create hex-core/src/ports/file_writer.rs with IFileWriter trait: fn write_file(&self, path: &Path, content: &str) -> Result<(), String> that returns error if path is critical
Create hex-agent/src/adapters/safe_file_writer.rs implementing IFileWriter that calls is_critical_path() before std::fs::write, returns Err if critical
Update hex-agent/src/workplan_executor.rs execute_workplan_autonomous() to accept IFileWriter trait object, replace direct std::fs::write calls with writer.write_file()
Update hex-agent/src/main.rs workplan command handler to instantiate SafeFileWriter and pass to execute_workplan_autonomous()
Verify critical path protection via test workplan + SafeFileWriter unit tests (rejects sched.rs / monitor.rs / workplan_executor.rs / main.rs across absolute, repo-relative, and bare-basename paths)

salvage_note: Resumed 2026-05-04: implemented missing pieces — IFileWriter port (hex-core), SafeFileWriter adapter with 4 passing unit tests (hex-agent), executor rewired to take &dyn IFileWriter, main.rs constructs SafeFileWriter. Workplan-internal status now matches reality; literal evidence-grep commands all pass. Earlier salvage triage flipped tasks to done while implementation was still inline-only — this commit makes the architecture honest.
title: Add SafeFileWriter adapter with critical path protection
